subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God! Blessed and exalted, sanctified and holy art Thou above all praise and laudation, and every mention and attribute [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم تبارکت و تعالیت و تقدست و تنزهت عن کل ذکر و ثناء و کل نعت لم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for women, @humility; meekness; lowliness
